style_name: Turquoise Red Techno Manga Poster Style
style_summary: A retro techno-manga poster system with a cream paper ground, huge red display lettering, turquoise technical clothing or hardware, dense mechanical linework, annotation panels, cel-shaded figure drawing, and slightly faded printed texture.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main illustrated subject, such as a technician, courier, repair worker, field researcher, designer, or compact service robot
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: clear action or pose that is not riding a motorcycle, such as calibrating, carrying, repairing, waiting, documenting, or balancing a device
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: new technical prop, device, kit, machine, container, tool, module, backpack, drone, instrument, or field apparatus
environment_variables.LOCATION: implied poster setting or environment, such as transit depot, greenhouse lab, harbor workshop, rooftop weather station, compact studio, or spaceport service bay
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: oversized headline, cream negative space, technical callout panel, tiny labels, gauges, diagram boxes, accent bars, serial marks, and small interface fragments
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: new oversized display headline, never copied from the reference
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: small fictional labels, serial marks, diagram notes, and decorative micro text
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: small lightning mark, dot, bar, circle seal, arrow, star, serial badge, or diagram icon
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: oversized turquoise jacket, workwear layers, gloves, boots, field vest, protective eyewear, scarf, or technical uniform details
environment_variables.STYLE_FIDELITY_ANCHORS: cream off-white poster background, huge red-orange block headline, turquoise main mass, large manga-style subject, flat cel shading, dense mechanical linework, annotation boxes, limited retro print palette, faded screenprint grain
environment_variables.SOURCE_CONTENT_TO_AVOID: motorcycle rider, motorbike wheel or engine, source character, source pose, copied Japanese headline, signature, watermark, app UI, platform icon, QR code, or direct source-image variant

negative_prompt: motorcycle, motorbike, bike wheel, motorcycle engine, license plate, original rider pose, exact source character, copied Japanese headline, copied signature, watermark, username, creator ID, app UI, back button icon, platform logo, QR code, photorealistic render, glossy 3D, clean vector art, cinematic background, deep perspective city, generic anime screenshot, low detail, plain white background, perfect typography

values.SUBJECT: compact weather-station courier in an oversized turquoise utility coat
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: calibrating a portable rooftop weather kit while balancing a folded tripod case
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: portable weather station with gauges, cables, sensor mast, warm gray panels, red-orange seals, straps, and tiny serial labels
values.LOCATION: rooftop service platform implied through technical labels, not a realistic skyline
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: cream off-white printed paper, huge red-orange custom block headline, one thin tan annotation panel, small gauges, diagram boxes, and fictional technical labels
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: teal workwear coat, gloves, utility belt, chunky boots, and protective neck scarf

values.SUBJECT: compact greenhouse repair android with a simple friendly face panel and teal shell
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: replacing a nutrient cartridge in a botanical lab module
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: transparent seedling cassette, hose cluster, small pump, repair tray, warm gray brackets, red-orange clips, bolts, and tiny labels
values.LOCATION: greenhouse service bay implied by diagram boxes and small fictional plant icons, not a realistic room
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: cream off-white printed poster paper, huge red-orange headline, thin tan annotation panel, tiny fictional labels, small gauge marks, and capsule tabs
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: teal service shell, soft black joints, tiny utility pouch, and protective gloves

values.SUBJECT: archive scanner mechanic in a teal work jacket and dark gloves
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: feeding a fragile film strip into a portable scan console
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: chunky scan console with small reels, vents, straps, red safety tabs, cable loops, warm gray casing, bolts, and tiny serial labels
values.LOCATION: archive workshop implied by document panels and technical notes on cream paper, not a realistic room
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: huge red-orange headline, cream off-white printed paper, thin tan callout frame, registration marks, small diagram boxes, and fictional labels
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: teal work jacket, layered shirt, dark gloves, utility apron, and compact pouch

values.SUBJECT: harbor signal designer wearing a turquoise field vest and protective scarf
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: assembling a compact floating beacon on a work mat
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: beacon module with antenna fins, rubber seals, rope loops, small lamps, warm gray casing, red-orange fasteners, straps, vents, bolts, and labels
values.LOCATION: harbor workshop implied only by small technical labels and diagram marks on cream paper, not a scenic waterfront
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: cream off-white printed poster paper, huge red-orange headline, tan annotation panels, fictional micro labels, capsule tags, arrows, serial marks, and small diagram boxes
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: teal field vest, layered work shirt, dark gloves, compact tool pouch, and sturdy boots
